title: Define Drag and Drop Properties
text: Define Drag and Drop Properties Define the widget properties for a drag source or drag target widget. For more information, see DropTarget . How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Drag and Drop Behavior Drag and drop behavior enables the user to select an object and drag it to another location with the mouse. When the mouse button is released, the selected object is copied, moved, or linked to by a shortcut. Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
